author: Joannis Baptista Scortia
title: De sacrosancto Missae sacrificio libri quatuor
remarks: Humanist, cites both Latin and Greek fathers in defense of allegories, plus he treats polemical questions from the Counter-reformation (e.g. massive digression on adoration of images)
order_rank: Jesuit, rhetoric, philosophy, & moral theology at Piacenza & Genoa
